description_long: This candle features a rectangular, upright form with a flat top and bottom, and its sides are adorned with printed graphics and text, including the prominent word 'Tang' on one face. The candle's body appears to be made of a solid, opaque material, likely wax, with a smooth, matte finish. The top surface is flat and does not show any visible wick or flame, suggesting it is unused or decorative. The printed designs on the sides include colorful diagrams, images, and text, giving it a modern, artistic appearance. The edges are sharp and clean, and the overall structure is boxy and geometric. There is no visible holder or base, and the candle is designed to stand on its own.
description: A rectangular, upright candle with printed graphics and text on its sides, featuring a smooth, matte finish and a modern, artistic design.
description_view_0: A thin side profile of the candle, showing its narrow edge and the absence of visible details or graphics.
description_view_1: The top view of the candle, displaying the word 'Tang' in large letters and a collage of images and text on the upper face.
description_view_2: The opposite thin side profile, similar to view 0, with no visible graphics or features.
description_view_3: The front face of the candle, prominently showing the word 'Tang' and a colorful, detailed collage of images and diagrams.
